metadata.title: Turning a Close 1v3 on VALORANT’s Split with Calm Aim and Smart Moves
metadata.description:
Watch how steady positioning and quick thinking help clutch a tough 1v3 on Split. Timing and clean shots make all the difference here.
What’s your go-to strategy for clutching tough rounds?
Share your favorite clutch moments below!

Drop your best clutch plays in the comments!
